active_form_receipt.rule: team_form selects the roster slot; active_form is the battle stat/type/ability source. No active-form receipt = no form-based stat/damage/speed claim.

nature_effect.rule: Nature display must include +/- effect in public set/card output, e.g. Jolly (+Spe / -SpA).

displayed_stats.formula: HP = Base + 75 + investment; Non-HP = floor((Base + 20 + investment) * nature_modifier)
displayed_stats.source: 01 active-form base stats + 00/09 stat formula + verify.py stat
displayed_stats.rule: No active-form receipt = no form-based stat/speed/damage claim. Mega/state forms use active_form as stat_source.

active_form_resolution.rule: team_form selects the roster slot; active_form is the battle stat/type/ability source.

displayed_stats.rule: No stat receipt = no public displayed stat number. Nature + 0-32/66 spread are required.

receipts.rule_note: redirection support; powder/grass/ability exceptions must be checked separately if relevant
receipts.priority_order_rule: Priority bracket is checked before Speed. Speed only breaks ties inside the same priority bracket.
receipts.caveat: Targeting, immunity, terrain, Protect/Wide Guard, redirection, and ability/item exceptions still require board checks before a final turn command.

receipts.priority_order_rule: Priority bracket is checked before Speed. Speed only breaks ties inside the same priority bracket.
receipts.caveat: Targeting, immunity, terrain, Protect/Wide Guard, redirection, and ability/item exceptions still require board checks before a final turn command.

priority_mechanics.rule: Priority bracket is checked before Speed; Speed only orders Pokémon inside the same priority bracket.

team_fit.team_mode_explanation: No explicit speed-control mode detected; speed investment must be justified by local role or benchmarks.

failures.detail: item_source/item_provenance must be one of the approved provenance labels
spread_source/spread_provenance must be one of the approved provenance labels

team_fit.rule: Meta is the candidate pool; final item/spread must be locally legal, team-fit justified, and provenance-labeled.

failures.detail: item_source/item_provenance must be one of the approved provenance labels

item_provenance.rule: Every final item must be provenance-labeled.

failures.detail: spread_source/spread_provenance must be one of the approved provenance labels

spread_provenance.rule: Every final spread must be provenance-labeled and team-fit justified.

spread_fit.rule: Use meta spread as baseline when available. Override only with speed/damage benchmark receipt; otherwise stay close to meta.

item_spread_coherence.rule: Item, spread, and reason must agree. Focus Sash defaults to action value (Speed/damage/utility timing); bulky Sash spreads need meta or benchmark receipts.

speed_plan.summary: No Tailwind/Trick Room speed-control mode detected.
speed_plan.rule: Do not recommend Tailwind or Trick Room from vague labels like fast/slow/bulky. Compare actual Speed receipts of intended active Pokémon first.

lead_plan.rule: Lead planning must show Turn 1-2 candidate lines and rejected/conditional lines; do not jump from move presence to a final game plan.

stat_profile.summary: HP 71 / Def 106 / SpD 80 / Spe 70: physical_bulk=low, special_bulk=low, speed=mid

threat_audit.rule: Risk/item/stat explanations require a semantic threat audit. Lint pass is not semantic verification.

item_threat_fit.rule: Defensive items must answer the actual weakness profile and board risk, not a single remembered weakness.

meta_threat_fit.source: team receipt + interaction receipts + optional approved meta threat list
meta_threat_fit.rule: No threatfit receipt = no 'team answers X' claim. Meta threat names must be connected to verified mechanics and team answers.

mechanic_interactions.rule: Named mechanic counter claims require verify.py interaction receipts; threatfit supplies team-level interaction summaries.

move_emoji_rendering.rule: Every public move display must use the verified move row type emoji.

public_render.rule: Public output must copy verifier-generated display fields; do not reconstruct manually.
Public output must copy move.display/stat/damage/type/priority fields from verifier receipts; do not reconstruct them manually.
